rationale: All 6 Fully-Automated ACs (AC-1..AC-6) pass via hermetic vitest integration tests against local Postgres. Branch isolation (AC-3) is proven: cross-branch PATCH returns 403 and DB record is verified unchanged. State machine is a pure lookup table with no DB dependency. The PATCH endpoint never trusts client-supplied branch_id — branch is always resolved server-side via resolveBranchScope. Migration is standalone (no transaction block). GET /orders/completed is registered before /:orderId. No correctness-blocking issues found. Mobile ACs (AC-7..AC-10) are Agent-Probe known-gap per plan; backlog stub exists. mustStopBeforeFinalize remains true — human review required before production deploy.
